title: A new $H_0$ measurement with SNe Requiem and Encore using Gravity.jl
summary: We present a strong-lensing (SL) analysis of the galaxy cluster MACS J0138.0-2155 (z=0.336), the first known lens cluster discovered to host two distinct multiply imaged Type Ia supernovae (SNe): SN Requiem and SN Encore. Both transients are located in the massive, multiply imaged red galaxy MRG-M0138 at z=1.949. The projected total mass of this cluster has been investigated with several independent lens models (Suyu+26; Pierel+26), using a sample of 23 spectroscopically confirmed multiple images from 8 background sources (0.767<z<3.420), identified from the HST and the JWST imaging data, and VLT/MUSE spectroscopy. In this work, we develop a new SL model based on a novel Bayesian parametric lens-modelling framework Gravity.jl, exploiting the same SL dataset. Our reference mass model accurately reproduces the observed image positions, with an image-plane rms image position residual of 0.24''. Assuming H0 = 70 km/s/Mpc, we predict the future reappearances of highly delayed SNe counter-images, finding Dt(1d,1a) = 3177_{-59}^{+78} d (May-September, 2032) for SN Encore and Dt(2d,2a) = 3938_{-77}^{+90} d (February-July, 2027) for SN Requiem. By allowing H0 to vary, and using the measured time delays of both SN Encore and SN Requiem together with their statistical uncertainties as observables, we infer the value of H0 jointly with the other lens-model free parameters. From this analysis, we obtain a new measurement of H0 = 67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc, consistent with the value inferred from the aforementioned independent lens models. This error is currently dominated by the large relative uncertainty on the measured time delays (>10%). The forthcoming reappearance of SN Requiem offers an immediate opportunity to significantly improve constraints on H0, provided that lens-model systematics are controlled. These results establish M0138 as a premier anchor for high-precision cluster-scale TDC.

AI.tldr: 本文利用新开发的贝叶斯参数透镜建模框架Gravity.jl，对星系团MACS J0138.0-2155进行强透镜分析，基于该团簇中两个多像Ia型超新星（SN Requiem和SN Encore）的观测数据，预测了它们未来的重现时间，并联合时间延迟测量约束哈勃常数H0=67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc。
AI.motivation: 星系团MACS J0138.0-2155是首个被发现宿主两个不同多像Ia型超新星（SN Requiem和SN Encore）的透镜团簇，这为利用时间延迟宇宙学（TDC）精确测量哈勃常数提供了独特机遇。此前已有若干独立透镜模型，但本研究旨在通过新的建模框架进一步提高精度并预测未来超新星重现事件。
AI.method: 基于Gravity.jl这一新颖的贝叶斯参数透镜建模框架，利用23个光谱确认的多重像（来自8个背景源，红移范围0.767<z<3.420）构建参考质量模型，该模型在图像平面上的均方根位置残差为0.24角秒。结合SN Encore和SN Requiem的实测时间延迟及其统计不确定性，联合推断H0及其他透镜模型自由参数。
AI.result: 参考模型精确再现观测图像位置。预测SN Encore将在2032年5-9月重现（延迟3177天），SN Requiem将在2027年2-7月重现（延迟3938天）。得到H0=67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc，与先前独立透镜模型结果一致，当前误差主要受时间延迟测量相对不确定性（>10%）支配。
AI.conclusion: M0138被确立为高精度星系团尺度时间延迟宇宙学的优先锚点。SN Requiem即将于2027年重现，为显著改进H0约束提供了直接机遇，前提是控制透镜模型系统误差。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们呈现了对星系团MACS J0138.0-2155（z=0.336）的强透镜（SL）分析，这是已知首个被发现有两次不同多重成像Ia型超新星（SNe）的透镜星系团：SN Requiem和SN Encore。这两个瞬变现象均位于z=1.949的大质量多重成像红色星系MRG-M0138中。该星系团的投影总质量已通过几个独立的透镜模型（Suyu+26; Pierel+26）进行了研究，这些模型使用了来自8个背景源（0.767<z<3.420）的23个光谱确认的多重图像样本，这些图像来自HST和JWST成像数据以及VLT/MUSE光谱。在这项工作中，我们基于一种新颖的贝叶斯参数透镜建模框架Gravity.jl开发了一个新的SL模型，利用了相同的SL数据集。我们的参考质量模型精确地再现了观测到的图像位置，图像平面均方根位置残差为0.24角秒。假设H0 = 70 km/s/Mpc，我们预测了高度延迟的SNe对应像的未来重现，发现SN Encore的Dt(1d,1a) = 3177_{-59}^{+78} 天（2032年5月至9月），SN Requiem的Dt(2d,2a) = 3938_{-77}^{+90} 天（2027年2月至7月）。通过允许H0变化，并利用SN Encore和SN Requiem的测量时间延迟及其统计不确定性作为观测量，我们联合推断出H0的值以及其他透镜模型自由参数。从这一分析中，我们得到了H0 = 67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc的新测量值，与前述独立透镜模型推断的值一致。该误差目前主要由测量时间延迟的大相对不确定性（>10%）主导。SN Requiem即将到来的重现为显著改进H0约束提供了直接机遇，前提是控制透镜模型系统误差。这些结果确立了M0138作为高精度星系团尺度时间延迟宇宙学的首要锚点。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，M0138被确立为高精度星系团尺度时间延迟宇宙学的优先锚点。SN Requiem即将于2027年重现，为显著改进H0约束提供了直接机遇，前提是控制透镜模型系统误差。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1 : M0138 observed with the JWST. The colour composite is constructed from the following filter combinations: F115W \(+\) F150W in blue, F200W \(+\) F277W in green, and F356W \(+\) F444W in red. The locations of the “gold” multiple-image systems are marked with circles (Ertl et al., 2025 ; Suyu et al., 2026 ) . SN Encore corresponds to System 1, while SN Requiem corresponds to System 2. The foreground (FG) and background (BG) galaxies are indicated by green circles. The three jellyfish galaxies are marked with cyan circles and labelled JF1, JF2, and JF3.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用JWST观测的M0138。彩色合成图像由以下滤光片组合构建：F115W \(+\) F150W（蓝色）、F200W \(+\) F277W（绿色）和F356W \(+\) F444W（红色）。“金色”多重图像系统的位置用圆圈标记（Ertl等人，2025；Suyu等人，2026）。SN Encore对应系统1，SN Requiem对应系统2。前景（FG）和背景（BG）星系用绿色圆圈表示。三个水母星系用青色圆圈标记，并标注为JF1、JF2和JF3。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2 : Calibration of the Faber–Jackson relation for cluster members from Acebron et al. ( 2025 ) . The circles show the measured stellar velocity dispersions of 14 bright cluster galaxies as a function of their total HST F160W magnitude. Points are colour-coded by the average spectral signal-to-noise ratio reported by Granata et al. ( 2025 ) . The reference galaxy used in the scaling relation is the BCG ( \(\sigma_{{BCG}}=322^{+16}_{-16}\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\) , \(m_{{F160W}}=15.30\) ). The orange line and shaded region show the median \(\sigma_{0}\) – \({F160W}\) relation and its \(68\%\) confidence interval derived from the stellar kinematic measurements, following the procedure described in Sect. 3.4.2 . The blue line and shaded region show the corresponding relation predicted by the SL model.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：来自Acebron等人（2025）的星系团成员Faber–Jackson关系校准。圆圈显示了14个明亮星系团星系的测量恒星速度弥散度，作为其总HST F160W星等的函数。点根据Granata等人（2025）报告的平均光谱信噪比进行颜色编码。标度关系中使用的参考星系是BCG（\(\sigma_{{BCG}}=322^{+16}_{-16}\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\)，\(m_{{F160W}}=15.30\)）。橙色线和阴影区域显示了根据第3.4.2节所述程序，从恒星运动学测量推导出的中位数\(\sigma_{0}\) – \({F160W}\)关系及其\(68\%\)置信区间。蓝色线和阴影区域显示了SL模型预测的相应关系。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the best-fit SL models for M0138. 4 4 4 Summary of the SL models and their overall performance. The columns report the model name, the number of free parameters explicitly varied in the lens model, \(N_{par}\) , the number of observational constraints, \(N_{const}\) , the number of degrees of freedom, d.o.f., the minimum total chi-square value, \(\chi^{2}_{{min,\,tot}}=\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}\) , the positional contribution to the total chi-square, \(\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}\) , the time-delay contribution to the total chi-square, \(\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}=\chi_{{min,\,td\,(E)}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td\,(R)}}^{2}\) (where the two terms denote the contributions from SN Encore and SN Requiem, respectively), the minimum chi-square value per degree-of-freedom \(\tilde{\chi}^{2}_{{min}}\) , the \(\Delta_{{rms}}\) value, and the mean Gelman–Rubin convergence statistic, \(\langle\hat{R}\rangle\) , of the MCMC chains. The number of degrees of freedom is computed as \({d.o.f.}=N_{const}-N_{par}-2N_{src}\) , where \(N_{src}=8\) is the number of independent source families, each contributing two source-plane coordinates that are marginalised over as nuisance parameters.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：M0138的最佳拟合SL模型总结。4 4 4 SL模型及其整体性能总结。列报告了模型名称、透镜模型中显式变化的自由参数数量\(N_{par}\)、观测约束数量\(N_{const}\)、自由度数量d.o.f.、最小总卡方值\(\chi^{2}_{{min,\,tot}}=\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}\)、总卡方中的位置贡献\(\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}\)、总卡方中的时间延迟贡献\(\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}=\chi_{{min,\,td\,(E)}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td\,(R)}}^{2}\)（其中两项分别表示来自SN Encore和SN Requiem的贡献）、每自由度最小卡方值\(\tilde{\chi}^{2}_{{min}}\)、\(\Delta_{{rms}}\)值以及MCMC链的平均Gelman–Rubin收敛统计量\(\langle\hat{R}\rangle\)。自由度计算为\({d.o.f.}=N_{const}-N_{par}-2N_{src}\)，其中\(N_{src}=8\)是独立源族的数量，每个源族贡献两个作为 nuisance 参数被边缘化的源平面坐标。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3 : Positional offsets between the observed and model-predicted multiple images in MACS J0138. The circles mark the observed image positions, while the arrows indicate the direction and magnitude of the offsets toward the corresponding model-predicted positions. For visual clarity, the arrow lengths have been magnified by a factor of ten relative to the true positional offsets. The \((0,0)\) point corresponds to the position of the BCG. The background contours show the total projected mass distribution obtained from the best-fitting lens model.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：MACS J0138中观测到的和模型预测的多重图像之间的位置偏移。圆圈标记观测到的图像位置，箭头指示朝向相应模型预测位置的偏移方向和大小。为视觉清晰起见，箭头长度相对于真实位置偏移放大了十倍。\((0,0)\)点对应BCG的位置。背景等高线显示了从最佳拟合透镜模型获得的总投影质量分布。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4 : Comparison between the observed and model-predicted SB distribution of the multiply imaged host galaxy MRG-M0138. The left panel shows the observed BCG-subtracted JWST F200W image, while the right panel shows the image-plane prediction obtained by lensing the best-fitting Sérsic model of the background source through the reference H0_fixed mass model. The Sérsic source-light parameters were optimised using the pixels associated with the arc hosting multiple image 3c, while the remaining counter-images were predicted a posteriori and were not included in the light-profile optimisation. The two insets on the right show the normalised residuals, clipped to the range \([-20\,\sigma,+20\,\sigma]\) , for the two regions highlighted by the dashed blue boxes in the model-prediction panel. Residuals associated with host-galaxy images 3d and 3e are omitted because of the contamination from the BCG. Red circles mark the observed multiple images of MRG-M0138 (left panel), listed in Table 4 in Ertl et al. ( 2025 ) , while the red boxes in the right panel correspond to the predicted positions. The blue cross in the right panel shows the predicted position of the host galaxy in the source plane. Coordinates are given in arcseconds relative to the BCG ( \({RA}=24.51570318\) deg, \({Dec}=-21.92547911\) deg).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：观测到的和模型预测的多重成像宿主星系MRG-M0138的面亮度分布比较。左图显示了观测到的BCG减除后的JWST F200W图像，而右图显示了通过将背景源的最佳拟合Sérsic模型通过参考H0_fixed质量模型进行透镜成像得到的图像平面预测。Sérsic源光参数是使用与多重图像3c相关的弧的像素进行优化的，而其余对应像是事后预测的，并未包含在光分布优化中。右图上的两个插图显示了归一化残差，裁剪到范围\([-20\,\sigma,+20\,\sigma]\)，对应于模型预测面板中虚线蓝色框突出的两个区域。由于BCG的污染，省略了与宿主星系图像3d和3e相关的残差。红色圆圈标记了MRG-M0138的观测多重图像（左图），列于Ertl等人（2025）的表4中，而右图中的红色方框对应于预测位置。右图中的蓝色十字显示了宿主星系在源平面中的预测位置。坐标以相对于BCG的角秒给出（\({RA}=24.51570318\)度，\({Dec}=-21.92547911\)度）。

figures.caption_en: Table 2 : Predicted time delays and magnifications of multiple images of SN Encore and SN Requiem ( H0_fixed mass model). 5 5 5 Values are reported as the median from the \(1000\) sampled chains, with uncertainties corresponding to the \(16\) th and \(84\) th percentiles. Images marked with * are model-predicted images that have not been detected to date, either because of their faintness, as for image 1c, or because of their long predicted time delays, as for images 1d, 1e, 2d, and 2e. Image 1e of SN Encore and image 2e of SN Requiem, marked with † , are predicted in \(47\%\) and \(34\%\) of the posterior samples, respectively; all other images are predicted in all samples. The reference anchor epoch \(t=0\) is set to 2016-07-18 for image 2a of SN Requiem (Rodney et al., 2021 ) , and to 2023-11-17 for image 1a of SN Encore (Pierel et al., 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：SN Encore和SN Requiem多重图像的预测时间延迟和放大率（H0_fixed质量模型）。5 5 5 值报告为来自\(1000\)个采样链的中位数，不确定性对应于\(16\)和\(84\)百分位数。标有*的图像是迄今为止尚未检测到的模型预测图像，要么是因为它们的光度暗淡（如图像1c），要么是因为它们预测的时间延迟较长（如图像1d、1e、2d和2e）。SN Encore的图像1e和SN Requiem的图像2e（标有†）分别在后验样本的\(47\%\)和\(34\%\)中被预测；所有其他图像在所有样本中都被预测。参考锚点历元\(t=0\)对于SN Requiem的图像2a设置为2016-07-18（Rodney等人，2021），对于SN Encore的图像1a设置为2023-11-17（Pierel等人，2024）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5 : Predicted reappearance time of image 2d of SN Requiem, expressed as the time delay relative to image 2a, \(\Delta t_{2d,2a}\) . The blue point shows the prediction from the Gravity.jl model presented in this work, while the other points show the predictions from the independent lens models analysed by Suyu et al. ( 2026 ) . Horizontal error bars indicate the corresponding \(68\%\) credible intervals. For our model, the interval is derived from \(1000\) posterior samples randomly drawn from the H0_fixed MCMC chains.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：SN Requiem图像2d的预测重现时间，表示为相对于图像2a的时间延迟\(\Delta t_{2d,2a}\)。蓝色点显示了本文提出的Gravity.jl模型的预测，而其他点显示了Suyu等人（2026）分析的独立透镜模型的预测。水平误差条表示相应的\(68\%\)置信区间。对于我们的模型，该区间是从H0_fixed MCMC链中随机抽取的\(1000\)个后验样本推导出的。

( 2026 ) . Each panel shows one image of SN Encore: the observed images 1a and 1b, and the model-predicted images 1c and 1d. Different symbols and colours correspond to different lens models, as indicated in the legend. The Gravity.jl predictions are shown in blue. The shaded bands show the projected uncertainty region associated with the Gravity.jl prediction. Grey circles denote the observed measured values (Pierel et al., 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：来自Gravity.jl模型的SN Encore多重图像预测位置与Suyu等人（2026）分析的独立透镜模型获得的预测位置的比较。每个面板显示SN Encore的一个图像：观测图像1a和1b，以及模型预测图像1c和1d。不同的符号和颜色对应不同的透镜模型，如图例所示。Gravity.jl预测以蓝色显示。阴影带显示了与Gravity.jl预测相关的投影不确定性区域。灰色圆圈表示观测到的测量值（Pierel等人，2024）。

title: A Strongly Lensed Ultra-faint Arc at $z \approx 10$ with an F200W excess in Abell S1063
summary: Strong gravitational lensing provides a powerful route to probing intrinsically faint galaxies during the first few hundred million years of cosmic history. In this Letter, we report the identification of GAR10, a highly magnified F115W-dropout galaxy at $z\approx10$ in the Abell S1063 cluster field, using deep JWST/NIRCam imaging from the GLIMPSE and GO-1840 programs. The source shows an unusually blue ultraviolet (UV) continuum and a significant F200W excess relative to adjacent bands. Under our high-magnification lensing solution, we infer a median magnification of $μ=43^{+78}_{-20}$, corresponding to an intrinsic UV magnitude of $M_{\rm UV}\approx-15.8$. We use exploratory Prospector SED modeling to examine two physically motivated interpretations of the observed photometry. In Case I, GAR10 is described by an extremely metal-poor, continuum-dominated stellar population at $z=10.75_{-0.34}^{+0.41}$, with a blue UV slope of $β=-2.92\pm0.12$ and a low metallicity of $\log(Z/Z_\odot)=-3.56_{-0.85}^{+0.65}$, consistent with an extremely metal-poor or Pop III-like continuum-dominated interpretation under the adopted priors. In Case II, GAR10 is interpreted as an extremely young (1--3 Myr), high-ionization galaxy at $z=10.45_{-0.21}^{+0.11}$, in which the F200W excess is produced by intense rest-frame UV emission lines, including CIV, HeII, and CIII]. Both cases can partially reproduce the current photometry within the adopted priors, but they imply distinct ionizing sources, enrichment histories, and possible contributions to cosmic reionization. GAR10 therefore represents a rare laboratory for studying ultra-faint galaxy formation at cosmic dawn. Future JWST/NIRSpec spectroscopy will be essential to distinguishing between the steep continuum and emission-line origins of the F200W excess.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST/NIRCam数据在Abell S1063星系团场中发现了一个红移z≈10的强引力透镜星系GAR10，其具有异常蓝的紫外连续谱和显著的F200W波段过剩。研究提出了两种物理解释：极端贫金属、连续谱主导的星族（Case I）或极年轻、高电离的星系（Case II）。GAR10为研究宇宙黎明时期的超暗星系形成提供了难得的实验室。
AI.motivation: 强引力透镜为探测宇宙早期（最初几亿年）的暗弱星系提供了独特途径，而目前对这一时期极暗星系的认识还非常有限。
AI.method: 利用JWST/NIRCam深度成像数据（GLIMPSE和GO-1840项目），结合高放大率引力透镜模型（中值放大率μ=43^{+78}_{-20}），以及Prospector SED建模分析观测到的多波段测光数据。
AI.result: 发现GAR10星系（z≈10），其内在紫外星等M_UV≈-15.8，紫外连续谱斜率β=-2.92±0.12。Case I解释为极端贫金属（log(Z/Z⊙)=-3.56）的连续谱主导星族；Case II解释为极年轻（1-3 Myr）的高电离星系，F200W过剩由CIV、HeII、CIII]等强发射线造成。
AI.conclusion: GAR10是研究宇宙黎明时期超暗星系形成的稀有案例，两种解释对电离源、增丰历史和再电离贡献有不同意义，未来需JWST/NIRSpec光谱来区分F200W过剩的来源。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜为探测宇宙最初几亿年期间本质暗淡的星系提供了强大途径。在本快报中，我们报告了在Abell S1063星系团场中，利用GLIMPSE和GO-1840项目的深JWST/NIRCam成像，识别出一个高度放大的F115W-dropout星系GAR10，其红移约为10。该源显示出异常蓝的紫外连续谱，以及相对于相邻波段的显著F200W过剩。根据我们的高放大率透镜解，我们推断中位放大率为μ=43^{+78}_{-20}，对应的内禀紫外星等为M_UV≈-15.8。我们使用探索性Prospector SED建模来检验观测测光数据的两种物理解释。在情形I中，GAR10被描述为一个在z=10.75_{-0.34}^{+0.41}处的极端贫金属、连续谱主导的星族，具有蓝的紫外斜率β=-2.92±0.12和低金属丰度log(Z/Z_⊙)=-3.56_{-0.85}^{+0.65}，这与在采用先验下极端贫金属或类Pop III连续谱主导的解释一致。在情形II中，GAR10被解释为一个在z=10.45_{-0.21}^{+0.11}处的极端年轻（1-3 Myr）、高电离星系，其中F200W过剩由强烈的静止系紫外发射线产生，包括CIV、HeII和CIII]。两种情形都能在采用先验下部分重现当前测光数据，但它们暗示了不同的电离源、增丰历史以及对宇宙再电离的可能贡献。因此，GAR10代表了研究宇宙黎明时期超暗星系形成的稀有实验室。未来的JWST/NIRSpec光谱对于区分F200W过剩的陡峭连续谱起源和发射线起源至关重要。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，GAR10是研究宇宙黎明时期超暗星系形成的稀有案例，两种解释对电离源、增丰历史和再电离贡献有不同意义，未来需JWST/NIRSpec光谱来区分F200W过剩的来源。

Top left: Wide-field RGB composite of the cluster core, synthesized from JWST/NIRCam filters: R (F356W + F444W), G (F200W + F277W), and B (F115W + F150W). The green lines show the critical curve at \(z\approx 10\) using an updated lensing model from Diego et al. ( 2026 ) . Top right: Zoomed-in views (R: F200W, G: F150W, B: F115W) demonstrating the foreground galaxy subtraction. This procedure clearly uncovers component \(d\) and the extended arc trace \(c\) , both of which were previously obscured. Bottom: Multi-band cutouts (from F090W to F480M) for components \(ab\) , \(c\) , and \(d\) , ordered by wavelength. All stamps are displayed with z-scale tied to highlight the robust F115W-dropout signature, consistent with the high-redshift interpretation of the arc structure.

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: EAZY Photometric redshift fitting for component \(ab\) of GAR10. The photometric points are measured from the foreground-subtracted, non-denoised JWST/NIRCam mosaics. The best-fit template, shown by the blue line, yields a high-redshift solution with a sharp Lyman alpha break and demonstrates that F200W exhibits a notable flux excess relative to F150W.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：GAR10分量ab的EAZY测光红移拟合。测光点来自前景减除、未降噪的JWST/NIRCam镶嵌图像。最佳拟合模板（蓝线所示）给出了一个具有尖锐莱曼α断裂的高红移解，并表明F200W相对于F150W显示出显著的流量过剩。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Best-fit Prospector SED modeling for component \(ab\) of GAR10 under two exploratory limiting scenarios. Left panel (Case I): A continuum-dominated, extremely metal-poor solution. The red curve shows a representative best-fit realization at \(z_{best}\approx 11.33\) . All physical quantities quoted for this panel are measured from this best-fit model spectrum rather than from the marginalized posterior medians. A line-clean power-law fit to the best-fit spectrum gives an exceptionally blue UV continuum slope of \(\beta_{best}=-3.15\) , while the best-fit stellar metallicity reaches \(\left[\log_{10}\left(Z/Z_{\odot}\right)\right]_{best}\approx-4.9\) . These best-fit values differ from the marginalized posterior medians reported in Table 1 ( \(z=10.75^{+0.41}_{-0.34}\) , \(\beta=-2.92\pm 0.12\) , and \(\log(Z/Z_{\odot})=-3.56_{-0.85}^{+0.65}\) ), because the Case I posterior is non-Gaussian and extends toward the edge of the adopted low-metallicity, dust-free parameter space. We therefore interpret this solution as an illustrative limiting case in which the F200W flux is dominated primarily by an ultra-blue stellar continuum, with negligible nebular-line contribution. Right panel (Case II): A lower-redshift, line-driven solution. The red curve shows the representative best-fit realization at \(z_{best}\approx 10.52\) . As in the left panel, all quoted quantities are measured from the best-fit model spectrum. A line-clean power-law fit to this best-fit spectrum gives a more moderate UV continuum slope of \(\beta_{best}=-2.58\) . This solution corresponds to an extremely young burst age of \(1\) – \(3\) Myr in the adopted Case II model setup. The apparent inverted Balmer break feature is therefore naturally associated with a very young, high-ionization stellar population with strong nebular emission. In this scenario, the F200W excess is reproduced by strong rest-frame UV nebular emission, primarily He II \(\lambda 1640\) and the C III] \(\lambda 1908\) , wit
figures.caption_zh: 图3：在两种探索性极限情景下，GAR10分量ab的最佳拟合Prospector SED建模。左面板（情形I）：连续谱主导的极端贫金属解。红线显示了在z_best≈11.33处的代表性最佳拟合实现。该面板中引用的所有物理量均来自该最佳拟合模型谱，而非来自边缘化后验中位数。对最佳拟合谱进行无发射线幂律拟合，得到异常蓝的紫外连续谱斜率β_best=-3.15，而最佳拟合恒星金属丰度达到[log_{10}(Z/Z_⊙)]_best≈-4.9。这些最佳拟合值与表1中报告的边缘化后验中位数（z=10.75^{+0.41}_{-0.34}，β=-2.92±0.12，log(Z/Z_⊙)=-3.56_{-0.85}^{+0.65}）不同，因为情形I的后验是非高斯的，并延伸到所采用的贫金属、无尘埃参数空间的边缘。因此，我们将此解解释为一个说明性极限情形，其中F200W流量主要来自超蓝恒星连续谱，而星云线贡献可忽略。右面板（情形II）：较低红移、线驱动的解。红线显示了在z_best≈10.52处的代表性最佳拟合实现。与左面板一样，所有引用的量均来自最佳拟合模型谱。对该最佳拟合谱进行无发射线幂律拟合，得到更适中的紫外连续谱斜率β_best=-2.58。此解对应于所采用情形II模型设置中极端年轻的爆发年龄1–3 Myr。因此，明显的倒巴尔默断裂特征自然地与具有强星云发射的非常年轻、高电离星族相关联。在此情景中，F200W过剩由强的静止系紫外星云发射重现，主要是He II λ1640和C III] λ1908。

title: First measurement of narrow-line flux ratios for a lensed quasar with JWST/NIRSpec IFS
comment: 18 pages, 9 figures, submitted to Physical Review D
summary: Strong gravitational lensing is a powerful probe of dark matter (DM) structure on subgalactic scales: in particular, statistics of flux-ratio anomalies (discrepancies between mass model predictions and observed flux ratios) in quadruply imaged quasars are sensitive to perturbations by low-mass DM halos down to $\sim 10^6 M_\odot$. Studies leveraging these anomalies require high-quality flux-ratio measurements from an emission region insensitive to stellar microlensing. In this paper, we present the first measurement of narrow-line flux ratios for a gravitationally lensed quasar using JWST/NIRSpec with Integral Field Spectroscopy (IFS), targeting the well-studied system RXJ1131$-$1231. Flux ratios are extracted from the [S III] 9071/9533 $Å$ narrow-line doublet - the first use of this doublet for substructure studies - by performing a full lens model reconstruction to isolate the unresolved nuclear emission from extended narrow-line emission. The resulting spectra are jointly modeled using $\texttt{lensqso-specfit}$, a publicly available software package introduced in this work for the simultaneous spectral fitting of multiple lensed quasar images. We achieve $\sim$ 5% uncertainties on the flux ratios, comparable to the precision of JWST/MIRI warm dust measurements, and detect a clear anomaly in the cusp images relative to a standard smooth lens model. Our results are in good agreement with previous narrow-line measurements and broadly consistent with JWST/MIRI warm dust flux ratios, with marginal ($\sim 2-3σ$) deviations. We demonstrate how such shifts between differently sized emission regions may be enhanced by small ($\sim 10$ pc) spatial offsets. Our method is generalizable to other systems with existing or future IFS observations, and the combination of narrow-line and warm dust flux ratios offers a new avenue for improving DM constraints with flux-ratio anomaly statistics.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST/NIRSpec积分场光谱首次测量了四重像引力透镜类星体RXJ1131-1231的[S III]窄线通量比（~5%精度），发现尖点图像存在明显异常，并开发了公开的联合光谱拟合软件lensqso-specfit。窄线与暖尘埃通量比的联合为暗物质小尺度结构研究提供了新途径。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜是探测亚星系尺度暗物质（DM）结构的有力工具：特别是四重成像类星体中流量比异常（质量模型预测与观测流量比之间的差异）的统计对低质量暗物质晕（低至约10^6 M_⊙）的扰动敏感。利用这些异常的研究需要来自对恒星微透镜不敏感的发射区的高质量流量比测量。本文中，我们首次利用JWST/NIRSpec积分场光谱（IFS）测量了引力透镜类星体的窄线流量比，目标为研究充分的系统RXJ1131−1231。流量比从[S III] 9071/9533 Å窄线双线中提取——这是该双线首次用于子结构研究——通过执行完整的透镜模型重建以将未分辨的核发射与延展的窄线发射分离。所得光谱使用lensqso-specfit进行联合建模，这是一个在本工作中引入的公开可用软件包，用于多个透镜类星体图像的同时光谱拟合。我们实现了约5%的流量比不确定度，与JWST/MIRI暖尘埃测量的精度相当，并检测到相对于标准光滑透镜模型的尖点图像中的明显异常。我们的结果与之前的窄线测量高度一致，并与JWST/MIRI暖尘埃流量比大致相符，存在边际（约2-3σ）偏差。我们展示了这种不同大小发射区之间的偏移如何可能被小的（约10 pc）空间偏移增强。我们的方法可推广至其他具有或未来将有IFS观测的系统，窄线与暖尘埃流量比的组合为利用流量比异常统计改进暗物质约束提供了新途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：该方法可推广至其他具有或未来将有IFS观测的系统，窄线与暖尘埃流量比的组合为利用流量比异常统计改进暗物质约束提供了新途径。

The four quasar images (A, B, C, and D) are labeled following the convention from previous studies of the same system (Sluse et al., 2007 ; Sugai et al., 2007 ; Keeley et al., 2025 ; Gilman et al., 2025 ; Shajib et al., 2026 ) , for direct comparison of the flux ratios. The main deflector and its nearby satellite are marked with G and S, respectively. In blue, we show a circular aperture of radius \(0\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}4\) (8 pixels) around image C. Right panel: Spectrum integrated over that aperture, with lines identified using the AGN spectral atlas from Vanden Berk et al. ( 2001 ) for the rest-frame optical, and Riffel et al. ( 2006 ) for the rest-frame near-infrared (NIR).

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Image model for the PSF reconstruction step. Top row: (Left) White-light image summed over the \(9320-9420\ ${\text{Å}}$\) wavelength range (in green in Figure 1 ). The dashed black circles show the location of a faint, compact light source, quadruply imaged but offset from the quasar images, that was explicitly included in the source light model (see Section 3.1.2 ). Bottom row, from left to right: initial PSF estimate in that range generated with stpsf , output of the PSF reconstruction process, and map of total per-pixel uncertainties on the final PSF model (see Appendix B ).

title: Constraints on the Gas Geometry Surrounding Little Red Dots through Narrow-Line Diagnostics
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, submitted to ApJ
summary: Little Red Dots (LRDs) are a recently identified population of high-redshift sources, with a common interpretation being accreting black holes embedded within a spherical, optically thick gas envelope. Within this framework, some models propose that the continuum arises from the dense-gas envelope, where hard ionizing radiation from the central engine is reprocessed into a stellar-like photosphere with an effective temperature of $\sim$5000 K. This implies that both the UV continuum and narrow-line emission are then powered by the host galaxy rather than an exposed central engine. To test whether this is consistent with the observed narrow-line ratios, we analyze multiple line diagnostics for a sample of $\sim$20 LRDs with high signal-to-noise NIRSpec grating spectra. We find that at least 40\% of the LRDs have line ratios pointing toward high ionization parameter and electron temperature, with a further 15\% also falling in the AGN regime for the O\textsc{i}/H$α$ diagnostic, indicative of harder ionizing radiation. These line ratios are incompatible with stellar photoionization from a star-forming host alone. This suggests lower density channels within the gas envelope through which high energy photons can escape and excite the surrounding narrow-line emitting gas. At the same time, most LRDs lack strong high-ionization line emission, with He\,\textsc{ii}/H$β$ $\lesssim0.1$, consistent with an ionizing spectrum softer than that of a standard AGN. Together, these results disfavour a uniform gas envelope with a covering fraction of unity, and instead point to a more complex geometry that gives rise to anisotropic ionizing radiation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析约20个Little Red Dots（LRDs）的高信噪比NIRSpec光栅光谱，发现至少40%的LRDs具有高电离参数和电子温度的线比，15%的LRDs在O I/Hα诊断中落入AGN区域，表明其存在比恒星电离更硬的辐射源，因此不支持单一、全覆盖的气体包层模型，而指向更复杂的各向异性几何结构。
AI.motivation: 检验LRDs的窄线比是否与“连续谱来自密气体包层、UV连续谱和窄线发射由宿主星系而非暴露的中央引擎驱动”的模型一致。

AI.result: 至少40%的LRDs线比指向高电离参数和电子温度；15%的LRDs在O I/Hα诊断中落入AGN区域；大多数LRDs缺乏强高电离线发射（He II/Hβ ≤ 0.1）。
AI.conclusion: 这些线比与恒星电离不相容，表明气体包层内存在低密度通道，高能光子可逃逸并激发周围窄线气体；不支持均匀全覆盖的气体包层，而指向更复杂的各向异性电离辐射几何结构。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 小红点（LRDs）是最近发现的一类高红移源，通常被解释为嵌入在球形光学厚气体包层中的吸积黑洞。在此框架下，一些模型提出连续谱来自稠密气体包层，其中来自中心引擎的硬电离辐射被再处理成有效温度约为5000 K的类恒星光球。这意味着紫外连续谱和窄线发射均由宿主星系而非暴露的中心引擎提供能量。为了检验这是否与观测到的窄线比一致，我们分析了约20个具有高信噪比NIRSpec光栅光谱的LRD样本的多种线诊断。我们发现至少40%的LRD的线比指向高电离参数和电子温度，另有15%在O I/Hα诊断中也落入AGN区域，表明存在更硬的电离辐射。这些线比与仅来自恒星形成宿主的光电离不相容。这表明气体包层内存在低密度通道，高能光子可通过这些通道逃逸并激发周围的窄线发射气体。同时，大多数LRD缺乏强的高电离线发射，He II/Hβ ≤ 0.1，这与比标准AGN更软的电离谱一致。综合来看，这些结果不支持覆盖因子为1的均匀气体包层，而是指向更复杂的几何结构，产生各向异性的电离辐射。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：这些线比与恒星电离不相容，表明气体包层内存在低密度通道，高能光子可逃逸并激发周围窄线气体；不支持均匀全覆盖的气体包层，而指向更复杂的各向异性电离辐射几何结构。

Here non-detections are treated as non-AGN, so the percentages represent lower limits. The bar plot on the top right shows the number of LRDs with overlapping diagnostics. At least 38% of LRDs have line ratios consistent with high ionization parameter and electron temperature but with a non-AGN-like ratio for the O1 diagnostic. At least 15% of LRDs in the sample have all three diagnostics collectively pointing to AGN or shocks. The bar plot on the bottom left shows the number of LRDs classified as AGN-like by each diagnostic individually.

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: A cross section of the possible gaseous structure surrounding LRDs. Incident radiation that goes through the higher gas columns will result in the Balmer break and absorption features observed in LRDs. The AGN-like line ratios suggest that there are low-density channels, possibly analogous to funnel-like regions, where the incident radiation is not reprocessed.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：LRD周围可能的气体结构横截面。穿过较高气体柱的入射辐射将导致LRD中观测到的巴尔末跳变和吸收特征。类AGN线比表明存在低密度通道，可能类似于漏斗状区域，其中入射辐射未被再处理。

title: Cm-wavelength Studies of Molecular Gas and Star Formation at High Redshift with the SKA
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII), 2026(arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no: AASKAII/RanWang01. Advancing Astrophysics with the SKA II (AASKAII) outlines the transformative scientific advances that will be enabled by the SKA telescopes
summary: The Square Kilometre Array will be a revolutionary instrument for the study of gas in the distant Universe. At frequencies below ~50 GHz, observations of redshifted emission from low-J transitions of CO, HCN, HCO+, and HNC, etc. provide insight into the kinematics and mass budget of the cold, dense star-forming gas in galaxies. Over the past decade, sensitive imaging using ALMA has detected and resolved the redshifted high-J molecular CO line emission and far-infrared fine structure lines in samples of galaxies over a wide redshift range, shedding light on active star-formation processes at the early epoch of galaxy evolution. In recent years, increasing numbers of young galaxies at high redshift are discovered by JWST, which significantly improved our knowledge of different galaxy populations across cosmic time. In this updated chapter of the SKA science book, we would like to highlight the importance of studies of the low-J molecular lines in high-z galaxies using SKA toward high frequencies, discussing the request of frequency coverage beyond 15 GHz and emphasizing its crucial role in exploring the cold molecular gas content in the young galaxy populations in the early universe and investigating the regions of active-star formation using molecular CO and various dense gas tracers.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 平方公里阵列（SKA）将成为研究遥远宇宙中气体的革命性仪器。在低于约50 GHz的频率下，观测来自CO、HCN、HCO+和HNC等分子的低J跃迁的红移发射，可以深入了解星系中冷、致密恒星形成气体的运动学和物质预算。在过去十年中，利用ALMA进行的灵敏成像已经探测并解析了广泛红移范围内星系样本中的红移高J分子CO谱线发射和远红外精细结构谱线，揭示了星系演化早期活跃的恒星形成过程。近年来，JWST发现了越来越多的高红移年轻星系，这显著提高了我们对不同星系种群在整个宇宙时间尺度上的认识。在这份更新的SKA科学书籍章节中，我们希望强调利用SKA在高频方向研究高红移星系中低J分子谱线的重要性，讨论频率覆盖范围超过15 GHz的需求，并强调其在探索早期宇宙年轻星系种群中的冷分子气体含量以及利用分子CO和各种致密气体示踪物研究活跃恒星形成区域方面的关键作用。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：SKA超过15 GHz的频率覆盖能力对于研究高红移星系的冷分子气体和恒星形成过程至关重要，是理解早期宇宙星系演化的关键工具。

title: Little Red Dots on FIRE: Exploring the formation and observational signatures of ultra-compact early galaxies
summary: Little Red Dots (LRDs) are compact sources with broad Balmer lines, Balmer breaks, anomalous UV emission, rising red continuum, and uncertain origin. We use FIRE cosmological simulations, 3D dust radiative transfer, and synthetic emission-line data cubes to test whether ultra-compact early galaxies can reproduce LRD-like observables without invoking AGN. In progenitors of present-day group halos ($M_{\rm halo} > 10^{13.5} M_{\odot}$), we identify transient phases at $z \approx 4-8$ lasting $\sim 150-400$ Myr in which strong dissipative inflows build massive ($M_{\star} \sim 10^{8.5}-10^{10.5} M_{\odot}$), UV-bright ($-23 \lesssim M_{\rm UV} \lesssim -20$), ultra-compact ($R_{\rm eff} < 300$ pc) stellar cores with extreme circular velocity ($V_{\rm circ} > 500$ km s$^{-1}$) and consistent with several LRD properties: strong Balmer breaks ($F_ν(4200{\rm Å})/F_ν(3500{\rm Å}) \sim 2$); blue UV beta slopes ($β_{\rm UV} \approx -1.25$); dust masses; ALMA non-detections; and Balmer-line widths up to $\sim 1500$ km s$^{-1}$ broadened by galaxy-scale dynamics. However, stellar emission and host-galaxy kinematics alone do not reproduce the red rest-optical continuum, more extreme Balmer breaks ($\gtrsim 2.5$) and line widths ($\gtrsim 2000$ km s$^{-1}$), or the broad-Balmer/narrow-forbidden-line signature of broad-line AGN. The same ultra-compact conditions efficiently fuel central BHs, suggesting a hybrid stellar+AGN scenario in which compact stars explain the UV continuum, Balmer break, and intermediate line widths while AGN supply the red optical continuum and more extreme line properties. With halo masses $M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{11-12.5} M_\odot$ and comoving abundance $\sim 2 \times 10^{-5} {\rm cMpc}^{-3}$ (for $\sim 20\%$ duty-cycle at $z \approx 4-8$), ultra-compact galaxies can contribute to the massive, bright LRD population.

AI.tldr: 本文利用FIRE宇宙学模拟和3D尘埃辐射传输，发现超致密早期星系（不含AGN）能解释小红点（LRD）的部分观测特征（如强巴尔默跳、UV光谱斜率、尘埃质量等），但无法重现极端的红连续谱、更宽的发射线以及宽巴尔默/窄禁线特征，因此提出恒星+AGN混合模型。
AI.motivation: 小红点（LRD）是未知起源的致密源，具有宽巴尔默线、巴尔默跳、异常UV辐射和上升的红连续谱。本文旨在检验超致密早期星系能否在没有AGN的情况下重现LRD的观测特征，以厘清其物理本质。
AI.method: 采用FIRE宇宙学模拟、3D尘埃辐射传输和合成发射线数据立方体，分析z≈4–8、当前群晕前身中的瞬态超致密星系，并与JWST观测的LRD性质进行对比。
AI.result: 超致密星系可解释部分LRD特征：强巴尔默跳（~2）、蓝UVβ斜率（~-1.25）、尘埃质量、ALMA未探测、巴尔默线宽达~1500 km/s。但无法解释红连续谱、更极端的巴尔默跳（>2.5）和线宽（>2000 km/s）及宽巴尔默/窄禁线AGN特征。超致密条件同时促进中心黑洞吸积，支持混合模型。
AI.conclusion: 超致密早期星系（不含AGN）可贡献部分LRD种群，但极端LRD特征需要AGN参与。混合恒星+AGN模型能统一解释LRD的多波段观测特征，超致密星系在z≈4–8的数密度约为2×10⁻⁵ cMpc⁻³。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 小红点（LRDs）是紧凑型源，具有宽巴尔默线、巴尔默跃变、异常紫外发射、上升的红色连续谱以及不确定的起源。我们利用FIRE宇宙学模拟、三维尘埃辐射传输和合成发射线数据立方体，测试超致密早期星系是否能在不涉及活动星系核（AGN）的情况下再现类似LRD的可观测特征。在现今群级暗晕（$M_{\rm halo} > 10^{13.5} M_{\odot}$）的前身中，我们识别出在$z \approx 4-8$期间持续约$\sim 150-400$ Myr的瞬态阶段，其中强烈的耗散内流构建了质量巨大（$M_{\star} \sim 10^{8.5}-10^{10.5} M_{\odot}$）、紫外明亮（$-23 \lesssim M_{\rm UV} \lesssim -20$）、超致密（$R_{\rm eff} < 300$ pc）的恒星核，具有极高的环状速度（$V_{\rm circ} > 500$ km s$^{-1}$），并与LRD的若干性质一致：强巴尔默跃变（$F_ν(4200{\rm Å})/F_ν(3500{\rm Å}) \sim 2$）；蓝色紫外β斜率（$β_{\rm UV} \approx -1.25$）；尘埃质量；ALMA未探测；以及由星系尺度动力学展宽的巴尔默线宽度高达$\sim 1500$ km s$^{-1}$。然而，仅凭恒星辐射和宿主星系运动学无法再现红色静止光学连续谱、更极端的巴尔默跃变（$\gtrsim 2.5$）和线宽（$\gtrsim 2000$ km s$^{-1}$），或宽巴尔默/窄禁线标志的宽线AGN特征。相同的超致密条件有效为中央黑洞提供燃料，暗示一种混合恒星+AGN情景：其中致密恒星解释了紫外连续谱、巴尔默跃变和中等线宽，而AGN则提供红色光学连续谱和更极端的线性质。暗晕质量$M_{\rm halo} \sim 10^{11-12.5} M_\odot$且共动数密度$\sim 2 \times 10^{-5} {\rm cMpc}^{-3}$（在$z \approx 4-8$期间占空比约$\sim 20\%$）的超致密星系，可对质量巨大、明亮的LRD种群做出贡献。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：超致密早期星系（不含AGN）可贡献部分LRD种群，但极端LRD特征需要AGN参与。混合恒星+AGN模型能统一解释LRD的多波段观测特征，超致密星系在z≈4–8的数密度约为2×10⁻⁵ cMpc⁻³。

title: Cosmological Galaxy Formation Modelling in the Era of the Square Kilometre Array
comment: Published in Advancing Astrophysics with the SKAII(AASKAII),2026(arXiv:2606.20366). Report-no:AASKAII/Lagos01. Advancing Astrophysics with the SKAII (AASKAII) outlines the transformative scientific advances that will be enabled by the SKA telescopes
summary: Over the past decade, galaxy formation simulations have advanced dramatically, transforming our ability to model the interstellar medium (ISM) and predict galaxies' radio emission. Yet the challenge of bridging physical scales--from sub-parsec star formation to gigaparsec cosmic structure--remains. The Square Kilometre Array (SKA) will map the cold gas and radio continuum of galaxies across cosmic time, demanding models that couple physical realism with cosmological reach. This chapter reviews the state-of-the-art in cosmological galaxy formation modelling in preparation for the SKA. We outline progress in simulating atomic hydrogen (HI), molecular gas, and radio continuum emission from both star formation and active galactic nuclei, highlighting how cosmological hydrodynamical simulations and semi-analytic models now jointly reproduce many observed gas properties. We emphasise the need for a coordinated, ``wedding-cake'' strategy that unites simulations of different scales, for forward modelling of observables to ensure fair comparison with data, and for the integration of new technologies such as AI-driven emulators to accelerate progress. Together, these efforts will enable theoretical models to both interpret and guide SKA science, turning simulations from passive interpreters into active engines for discovery.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了为迎接SKA时代，宇宙学星系形成模拟的最新进展，强调了跨尺度模拟、正向建模和AI驱动模拟器的重要性，旨在将模拟从被动解释转变为主动发现引擎。

AI.method: 采用“婚礼蛋糕”策略，整合不同尺度的宇宙学流体动力学模拟和半解析模型，并通过正向建模和AI仿真器加速进展。

AI.conclusion: 通过协调跨尺度模拟、正向建模和AI技术，理论模型将从被动的解释工具转变为主动的发现引擎，支撑SKA的科学目标。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，星系形成模拟取得了显著进展，极大地提升了我们对星际介质（ISM）进行建模以及预测星系射电辐射的能力。然而，连接不同物理尺度——从亚秒差距的恒星形成到吉秒差距的宇宙结构——的挑战依然存在。平方公里阵列（SKA）将绘制宇宙时间尺度上星系的冷气体和射电连续谱，这要求模型能够将物理真实性与宇宙学尺度相结合。本章回顾了为准备SKA而进行的宇宙学星系形成建模的最新进展。我们概述了在模拟原子氢（HI）、分子气体以及来自恒星形成和活动星系核的射电连续谱辐射方面取得的进展，强调了宇宙学流体动力学模拟和半解析模型现在如何共同再现许多观测到的气体性质。我们强调需要一种协调的“千层蛋糕”策略，该策略联合不同尺度的模拟，对可观测物理量进行正向建模以确保与数据的公平比较，并整合如人工智能驱动的仿真器等新技术以加速进展。这些共同努力将使理论模型能够解释和指导SKA的科学目标，将模拟从被动的解释者转变为主动的发现引擎。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：通过协调跨尺度模拟、正向建模和AI技术，理论模型将从被动的解释工具转变为主动的发现引擎，支撑SKA的科学目标。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Modified from Crain and van de Voort ( 2023 ) to show the processes that are happening at different scales and place them into the context of what is directly simulated and what is modelled via so called “subgrid physics models”. The exact transition of when one goes from directly simulating to modelling depends on the tools at hand. The arrows at the top show the regions that are typically directly simulated in different techniques based on the latest models and simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：修改自Crain and van de Voort (2023)，展示了在不同尺度上发生的过程，并将它们置于直接模拟的内容和通过所谓的“子网格物理模型”建模的内容的背景下。从直接模拟过渡到建模的确切点取决于可用的工具。顶部的箭头显示了基于最新模型和模拟的不同技术中通常直接模拟的区域。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The distribution of gas particles or cells in the temperature vs density plane at \(z=0\) in three different cosmological hydrodynamical simulations. Eagle (left panel) (Crain et al. , 2017 ) lacked an explicit model of the ISM and instead imposed an equation of state. Here, pixels are coloured by the mass fraction, showing that most of the gas mass in the \(z=0\) universe is in the form of hot, low-density gas. FIREbox (middle panel) (Feldmann et al. , 2023 ) uses cooling tables to allow the gas to cool down to \(10\) K and account for the HII, HI, H 2 partition in post-processing. Here, pixels are coloured by the fraction of HII (red), HI (green) and H 2 (blue) mass. Colibre (right panel) (Schaye et al. , 2026 ) includes explicit on-the-fly non-equilibrium chemistry and cooling that explicitly tracks the HII, HI and H 2 species. Here, pixels are coloured by the fraction of HII (blue), HI (red) and H 2 (green) mass. The middle and right panel are examples of the recent progress in the field.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：在三种不同的宇宙学流体动力学模拟中，\(z=0\) 时气体粒子或单元在温度-密度平面上的分布。Eagle（左图）(Crain et al., 2017) 缺乏明确的ISM模型，而是施加了一个状态方程。此处，像素按质量分数着色，显示 \(z=0\) 宇宙中大部分气体质量以热、低密度气体的形式存在。FIREbox（中图）(Feldmann et al., 2023) 使用冷却表使气体冷却到 \(10\) K，并在后处理中考虑HII、HI、H\(_2\) 的分配。此处，像素按HII（红色）、HI（绿色）和H\(_2\)（蓝色）质量分数着色。Colibre（右图）(Schaye et al., 2026) 包含明确的即时非平衡化学和冷却，明确追踪HII、HI和H\(_2\) 物种。此处，像素按HII（蓝色）、HI（红色）和H\(_2\)（绿色）质量分数着色。中图和右图是该领域近期进展的例子。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Left panels: Joint distribution of HI column density ( \(N_{{HI}}\) ) and velocity dispersion ( \(\sigma\) ). Pairs of values are drawn from corresponding pixels in the \(0^{{th}}\) and \(2^{{nd}}\) moment maps of high- ( \(\sim 25^{\) ; top row – HR) and low-resolution ( \(\sim 65^{\) ; bottom row – LR) spectral cubes obtained with MeerKAT (left column) for a sample of \(5\) \({L}_{\star}\) galaxies. The centre and right columns show the same measurement for samples of galaxies of similar mass drawn from the TNG50 and FIRE-2 simulation suites, respectively. Simulated galaxies have been ‘observed’ at the same resolution and sensitivity as the corresponding MeerKAT observations. These simulations have much more gas at low column density ( \(N_{{HI}} 30\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\) ) at higher column ( \(N_{{HI}}>10^{19}\,{cm}^{-2}\) ) that is also not observed. (Reproduced from Fig. 5 in Marasco et al. , 2025 .) Right panel: Cumulative HI flux as a function of projected distance for MeerKAT galaxies, compared with selected TNG50 and FIRE-2 galaxies (Reproduced from Fig. 7 in Marasco et al. 2025 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：左图：HI柱密度 (\(N_{{HI}}\)) 和速度弥散度 (\(\sigma\)) 的联合分布。数值对取自使用MeerKAT（左列）对 \(5\) 个 \({L}_{\star}\) 星系样本进行高分辨率（\(\sim 25^{\)；上行 – HR）和低分辨率（\(\sim 65^{\)；下行 – LR）光谱立方体的 \(0^{{th}}\) 和 \(2^{{nd}}\) 矩图中的对应像素。中列和右列分别显示了从TNG50和FIRE-2模拟套件中抽取的相似质量星系样本的相同测量结果。模拟星系已在与相应MeerKAT观测相同的分辨率和灵敏度下被“观测”。这些模拟在低柱密度 (\(N_{{HI}} 30\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\)) 处有更多气体，这也是未观测到的。（复制自Marasco et al., 2025 的图5。）右图：MeerKAT星系的累积HI通量作为投影距离的函数，与选定的TNG50和FIRE-2星系进行比较（复制自Marasco et al. 2025 的图7）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: A compilation of observed galaxies collected by Santos-Santos et al. ( 2020 ) in the space of \(\eta_{{rot}}\) and \(\eta_{{bar}}\) . The \(\eta_{{rot}}\) parameter is the ratio of the rotation curve amplitude at a suitably chosen ‘inner’ radius ( \(V_{{fid}}\) ) and its maximum ( \(V_{{max}}\) ), and serves as a proxy for the rotation curve shape: a higher (lower) value of \(\eta_{{rot}}\) is suggestive of a dark matter cusp (core). The horizontal grey line marks the expectation for an NFW halo model. The \(\eta_{{bar}}\) parameter is a measure of the influence of the baryonic (stellar & gas) components of the galaxy on its kinematics within the same inner aperture. Higher \(\eta_{{bar}}\) values correspond to more centrally baryon-dominated galaxies. Points are coloured by \(V_{{max}}\) . For low mass galaxies ( \(V_{{max}}\lesssim 100\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\) ;black-orange points) an anti-correlation with substantial scatter between \(\eta_{{rot}}\) and \(\eta_{{bar}}\) emerges. This trend is challenging to explain and provides a stringent test of theories proposed to resolve the cusp-core discrepancy. (Reproduced from Fig. 4 in Santos-Santos et al. , 2020 .)
figures.caption_zh: 图4：Santos-Santos et al. (2020) 收集的观测星系在 \(\eta_{{rot}}\) 和 \(\eta_{{bar}}\) 空间中的汇编。\(\eta_{{rot}}\) 参数是在适当选择的“内部”半径 (\(V_{{fid}}\)) 处的旋转曲线幅度与其最大值 (\(V_{{max}}\)) 的比值，并作为旋转曲线形状的代理：\(\eta_{{rot}}\) 的较高（较低）值暗示暗物质尖点（核）。水平灰线标记了NFW晕模型的预期值。\(\eta_{{bar}}\) 参数是星系的重子（恒星和气体）成分在同一内部孔径内对其动力学影响的度量。较高的 \(\eta_{{bar}}\) 值对应于更中心重子主导的星系。点按 \(V_{{max}}\) 着色。对于低质量星系 (\(V_{{max}}\lesssim 100\,{km}\,{s}^{-1}\)；黑-橙色点)，\(\eta_{{rot}}\) 和 \(\eta_{{bar}}\) 之间出现了具有显著离散度的反相关。这一趋势难以解释，并为旨在解决尖点-核差异的理论提供了严格的检验。（复制自Santos-Santos et al., 2020 的图4。）

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The HI velocity width function is a strong constraint on the halo mass function of gas rich galaxies and therefore a potential test of cosmological models, but faithfully modelling the galaxy distribution in HI mass ( \(M_{{HI}}\) ) and line width ( \(w_{50}\) ) requires capturing the complexity of cold gas dynamics. A detailed forward model of the spectra of galaxies in the GALFORM semi-analytic model (green line, adapted from fig. 4 in Brooks et al. , 2023 ) greatly overpredicts (underpredicts) the number counts of low- \(w_{{50}}\) (high- \(w_{50}\) ) galaxies in the ALFALFA survey (open crosses; Haynes et al. , 2018 ) . However, a similar forward modelling applied to a different semi-analytic model ( Shark ; Chauhan et al. 2019 , shown for two \(N\) -body boxes medi and micro, representing lower and higher resolution, respectively) is in much better agreement with the data, showing how sensitive this is to the underlying baryon physics. Hydrodynamical models like Eagle (purple line, reproduced from ‘EAGLE25’ curve in fig. 4 of Oman et al. , 2024 ) capture the non-linear relationship between halo mass and \(w_{50}\) – and especially its scatter – arguably more accurately (see fig. 7 in Oman et al. , 2024 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：HI速度宽度函数是对富气星系晕质量函数的强约束，因此是宇宙学模型的潜在检验，但忠实地模拟HI质量 (\(M_{{HI}}\)) 和谱线宽度 (\(w_{50}\)) 中的星系分布需要捕捉冷气体动力学的复杂性。GALFORM半解析模型中星系光谱的详细正向模型（绿线，改编自Brooks et al., 2023 的图4）极大地高估（低估）了ALFALFA巡天（开放十字；Haynes et al., 2018）中低 \(w_{{50}}\) （高 \(w_{50}\) ）星系的计数。然而，应用于不同半解析模型（Shark；Chauhan et al. 2019，显示为两个 \(N\) 体盒子medi和micro，分别代表较低和较高分辨率）的类似正向建模与数据吻合得更好，这表明这对底层重子物理非常敏感。像Eagle（紫色线，复制自Oman et al., 2024 图4中的‘EAGLE25’曲线）这样的流体动力学模型捕捉了晕质量与 \(w_{50}\) 之间的非线性关系——尤其是其离散度——可以说更准确（见Oman et al., 2024 的图7）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Taken from Figures 4 and 7 in Gensior et al. ( 2024 ) . The maps on the left show face-on projection of the HI surface density for four example galaxies in the EMP- Pathfinder simulations employing a constant star formation efficiency (top) and an efficiency that depends on the turbulence of the ISM (bottom). The plot on the right shows radial profiles of the HI disc scale heights of the simulated galaxies, showing that the EMP- Pathfinder simulations employing a constant star formation efficiency produces HI discs that are substantially thicker than those observed in the nearby universe (black symbols with errorbars).
figures.caption_zh: 图6：取自Gensior et al. (2024) 的图4和图7。左侧的图显示了EMP-Pathfinder模拟中四个示例星系采用恒定恒星形成效率（上）和依赖于ISM湍流的效率（下）时的HI面密度正面投影。右侧的图显示了模拟星系HI盘标高（disc scale heights）的径向轮廓，表明采用恒定恒星形成效率的EMP-Pathfinder模拟产生的HI盘明显比近邻宇宙中观测到的（带误差棒的黑点）更厚。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Figure 1 in Stevens et al. ( 2019b ) , showing the projected HI column density of a galaxy cluster of mass \(1.7\times 10^{14}\,M_{\odot}\) in TNG at \(z=0\) . Circles indicate the equivalent physical beam size used to measure HI masses considering the xGASS survey (Catinella et al. , 2018 ) . Circles are coloured by the stellar mass of the galaxy they are centred on. The central galaxy of the cluster is indicated by red circle.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：Stevens et al. (2019b) 的图1，显示了TNG中 \(z=0\) 时质量为 \(1.7\times 10^{14}\,M_{\odot}\) 的星系团的投影HI柱密度。圆圈表示考虑xGASS巡天（Catinella et al., 2018）时用于测量HI质量的等效物理波束大小。圆圈按其中心星系的恒星质量着色。星团的中心星系由红色圆圈指示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: The HI mass function at \(z=0\) (solid lines), \(z=1\) (dashed lines), and \(z=2\) (dotted lines) in \(3\) semi-analytic models ( Shark , GAEA, GALFORM) and \(3\) cosmological hydrodynamical simulations ( Eagle , TNG and Simba), as labelled in each panel. Observations at \(z\approx 0\) from Zwaan et al. ( 2005 ) and Jones et al. ( 2018 ) are shown as grey circles and crosses, respectively; while the inferred HI mass function at \(z\approx 1\) from convolving stacked spectra with measured optical luminosity functions at \(z\approx 1\) (Chowdhury et al. , 2024 ) are shown as a grey band. Eagle and Simba predict the number densities of galaxies to increase with increasing redshift, while the other simulations predict the opposite trend. None of the simulations appear to reproduce the level of increase in number density inferred from the \(z\approx 1\) observations.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：在 \(z=0\) （实线）、\(z=1\) （虚线）和 \(z=2\) （点线）处的HI质量函数，分别来自 \(3\) 个半解析模型（Shark, GAEA, GALFORM）和 \(3\) 个宇宙学流体动力学模拟（Eagle, TNG和Simba），如每个面板中所标注。来自Zwaan et al. (2005) 和Jones et al. (2018) 的 \(z\approx 0\) 观测分别显示为灰色圆圈和十字；而通过将堆叠光谱与 \(z\approx 1\) 处测量的光学光度函数卷积推断出的 \(z\approx 1\) 处HI质量函数（Chowdhury et al., 2024）显示为灰色带。Eagle和Simba预测星系的数密度随红移增加而增加，而其他模拟则预测相反的趋势。没有一个模拟似乎能再现从 \(z\approx 1\) 观测推断出的数密度增加水平。

title: Discovery of a Barred-Spiral Galaxy at $z_{spec}$ = 3.16 II. The Star Formation History
summary: We present a detailed analysis of a massive barred galaxy at $z_{spec}=3.1591$ using deep multi-band imaging from HST and JWST. For the first time, we resolve its morphology and stellar structures thanks to the JWST/NIRCam NIR and MIR photometry. The galaxy possesses two distinct components with significantly different colors. Through careful image decomposition and masking, we isolate and characterize the flux contribution from each component. The galaxy exhibits a clear spiral morphology, and in a separate companion paper, we present evidence suggesting the presence of a stellar bar. Based on spatially resolved spectral energy distribution modeling with Prospector, we derive the star formation history and other physical properties of the bar and the surrounding regions. The total stellar mass of the galaxy is constrained as $\log(M_*/M_{\odot}) = 10.63\pm0.13$. We find that the bar region contains around 30% of the total stellar mass, but only accounts for around 8% of the recent star formation rate. The region containing the potential bar shows a significantly older mass-weighted stellar age, supporting the inside-out scenario for galaxy formation, and providing tentative evidence for bar quenching in the early stage. The quick onset of a stellar bar at this redshift requires a low dark matter fraction, suggesting the baryon-dominated nature of high-$z$ massive galaxies, and offering rare insight into galaxy evolution at around two billion years after the Big Bang.

AI.tldr: 利用HST和JWST深度多波段成像，首次在z=3.1591处解析了一个带棒星系的形态与恒星结构。棒区包含约30%的恒星质量，但仅贡献约8%的近期恒星形成率，支持由内而外的星系形成场景，并为早期棒 quenching 提供了初步证据。
AI.motivation: 高红移星系中棒结构的观测非常困难，此前缺乏足够分辨率的成像数据来研究早期宇宙中棒状星系的性质及其对星系演化的影响。
AI.method: 使用HST和JWST多波段成像数据，通过图像分解和掩膜技术分离不同成分，结合Prospector进行空间分辨的光谱能量分布(SED)建模，推导恒星形成历史和物理性质。
AI.result: 总恒星质量为log(M*/M⊙)=10.63±0.13；棒区占总质量的约30%，但仅占近期恒星形成率的约8%；棒区质量加权恒星年龄显著更老。
AI.conclusion: 支持由内而外的星系形成场景，提供早期棒 quenching 的初步证据；高红移快速形成恒星棒要求低暗物质分数，表明高红移大质量星系由重子物质主导。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用HST和JWST的深场多波段成像，对红移$z_{spec}=3.1591$处的一个大质量棒旋星系进行了详细分析。得益于JWST/NIRCam近红外和中红外测光，我们首次解析了其形态和恒星结构。该星系包含两个颜色显著不同的独立成分。通过细致的图像分解和掩膜处理，我们分离并表征了每个成分的流量贡献。该星系呈现出清晰的旋涡形态，在另一篇配套论文中，我们提出了存在恒星棒的证据。基于Prospector进行的空间分辨光谱能量分布建模，我们推导了棒区域及其周围区域的恒星形成历史和其他物理性质。该星系的总恒星质量被约束为$\log(M_*/M_{\odot}) = 10.63\pm0.13$。我们发现棒区域包含约30%的总恒星质量，但仅贡献了约8%的近期恒星形成率。包含潜在棒的区域显示出显著更老的恒星质量加权年龄，支持了星系形成的由内而外演化场景，并为早期阶段棒 quenching 提供了初步证据。在此红移处恒星棒的快速形成要求较低的暗物质比例，表明高红移大质量星系由重子物质主导，为理解大爆炸后约20亿年时的星系演化提供了罕见见解。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论支持由内而外的星系形成场景，并提供早期棒 quenching 的初步证据；高红移快速形成恒星棒要求低暗物质分数，表明高红移大质量星系由重子物质主导。

title: Probing the molecular gas content of galaxies in an over-dense group at z~0.7: a test case for environmental quenching
summary: To probe the impact of group environment on molecular gas reservoirs at intermediate redshift, we observed the CO(2-1) emission in the galaxy group COSMOS-Gr30 at $z \sim 0.7$ with IRAM's NOEMA and 30m telescopes. This dense environment, located at the intersection of large-scale cosmic web filaments, has the specificity to host a large ($\sim 10^{4}$ kpc$^{2}$) ionized gas structure revealed by MUSE. We detect CO emission in four galaxies of the group at $\mathrm{S/N} > 5$ and derive upper limits for the remaining group members with secure spectroscopic redshifts. Stacked measurements indicate that group galaxies exhibit on average molecular gas contents reduced by $\sim 0.5$ dex relative to field scaling relations, corresponding to gas fractions that are $20\%$ to $40\%$ of those found in typical main-sequence galaxies. Although the uncertainties are significant, this suggests that environmental processes efficiently deplete molecular gas reservoirs in the galaxies of this group. The 30m observations place an upper limit on the molecular gas associated with the extended ionized structure, $M_{\rm gas} < 2 \times 10^{10} \rm M_\odot$, implying that less than a third of the gas in the intra-group medium is in a cold, star-forming phase. Together, these results contribute to show how environmental mechanisms in dense group environments act to remove or suppress molecular gas within galaxies, capturing quenching processes in action.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用NOEMA和30m望远镜观测了红移z~0.7的星系群COSMOS-Gr30中的CO(2-1)发射，发现群星系平均分子气体含量比场星系标度关系低约0.5 dex，气体分数仅为主序星系的20%-40%，表明环境机制有效耗尽了分子气体储库。同时，对扩展电离气体结构的观测上限表明，星系群内介质中只有不到三分之一的气体处于冷的恒星形成相。
AI.motivation: 探究中等红移处群环境对星系分子气体储库的影响，特别是在宇宙大尺度纤维结构交汇处的致密环境中。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 为了探究群环境对中等红移星系分子气体储量的影响，我们利用IRAM的NOEMA和30米望远镜观测了星系群COSMOS-Gr30在$z \sim 0.7$处的CO(2-1)发射。这个致密环境位于大尺度宇宙网纤维的交汇处，其特殊性在于拥有一个由MUSE揭示的大型（$\sim 10^{4}$ kpc$^{2}$）电离气体结构。我们在群中的四个星系中探测到了信噪比$\mathrm{S/N} > 5$的CO发射，并为其余具有可靠光谱红移的群成员推导出了上限。叠加测量表明，群星系平均的分子气体含量相对于场星系标度关系减少了约0.5 dex，对应的气体分数仅为典型主序星系的20%至40%。尽管不确定性显著，但这表明环境过程有效地耗尽了该群星系中的分子气体储库。30米观测对与扩展电离结构相关的分子气体设定了上限，$M_{\rm gas} < 2 \times 10^{10} \rm M_\odot$，这意味着群内介质中不到三分之一的气体处于冷的恒星形成相。这些结果共同展示了致密群环境中的环境机制如何移除或抑制星系内的分子气体，捕捉到了正在进行的星系熄灭过程。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，致密群环境中的环境机制有效移除或抑制了星系内的分子气体，捕获了正在进行的星系熄灭过程。

Logarithmic MUSE [O ii ] contours from Epinat et al. ( 2018 , 2024 ) are overlaid in blue. Eight galaxies of the group, including an AGN-host (#71), are embedded in a huge [O ii ]-bright structure of ionized gas extending over \(\sim 10^{4}\) kpc 2 . Both the NOEMA primary beam (solid black circle of 38″ diameter at \(\nu_{obs}=133.6\penalty 10000\ GHz\) ) and the 30m beam (dashed black circle of 20″ diameter at the same observing frequency) cover these galaxies. Galaxies observed by MUSE are identified by their MUSE IDs and colored according to their position with respect to the main sequence ( on in green, below in red and above in blue, cf. Fig. 2 ). Galaxies whose CO(2-1) emission was detected as part of our NOEMA program, namely #71, #105, #119, and #131, are highlighted in bold. The MUSE field of view is indicated by a light gray line.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：来自COSMOS-Web项目（Casey等人，2023）的CGr30星系群在\(z\sim 0.7\)处致密区域的JWST图像（F277W波段，对数尺度，任意单位），星系群成员用圆圈标记。叠加了来自Epinat等人（2018，2024）的对数尺度MUSE [O ii]等值线（蓝色）。该群的八个星系，包括一个AGN宿主（#71），嵌入在一个巨大的、延伸超过\(\sim 10^{4}\) kpc 2 的[O ii]明亮电离气体结构中。NOEMA主波束（在\(\nu_{obs}=133.6\penalty 10000\ GHz\)处直径为38″的实心黑圈）和30米波束（相同观测频率下直径为20″的虚线黑圈）都覆盖了这些星系。由MUSE观测到的星系通过其MUSE ID标识，并根据它们相对于主序带的位置着色（绿色为在带上，红色为在带下，蓝色为在带上，参见图2）。作为我们NOEMA项目一部分而探测到CO(2-1)发射的星系，即#71、#105、#119和#131，以粗体突出显示。MUSE视场由浅灰色线表示。

title: The EDGE-CALIFA Survey: Star Formation Efficiency and Galaxy Quenching across 62 Main Sequence, Green Valley, and Red Galaxies
comment: 22 pages of main text + 3 appendices. Accepted for publication in ApJ. The GBT-EDGE dataset is available on Zenodo at https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20707368
summary: We present GBT-EDGE, a new CO(1-0) survey using the Green Bank Telescope to map 62 nearby (10-140 Mpc) galaxies spanning the star-forming main sequence (SFMS), green valley, and red sequence. The galaxy sample is selected from the CALIFA survey with integral field spectroscopy (IFS), which provides a representative census of local galactic environments. Combining the CO dataset with CALIFA's optical IFS measurements, we derive molecular gas masses, star formation rates (SFR), metallicities, and stellar mass densities to measure star formation efficiency (SFE) and investigate the physical drivers of galaxy quenching. We obtain a median molecular gas depletion time of $2.10^{+2.35}_{-1.31}$, $6.90^{+17.00}_{-3.67}$, and $127.7^{+201.6}_{-113.4}$ Gyr for our sample of main sequence, green valley, and red galaxies, respectively, assuming a Galactic CO-to-H2 conversion factor. By applying various conversion factor prescriptions, we also confirm a systematic decrease of SFE with galaxy's offset below the SFMS, regardless of the adopted prescription. This suggests that the low SFR in some quenched galaxies is primarily driven by suppressed SFE rather than an absence of molecular gas. Our results provide evidence that galaxies below the main sequence can retain substantial molecular gas reservoirs comparable to star-forming galaxies, but they exhibit longer depletion times and form stars inefficiently, possibly due to the combined effects of low gas density and morphological quenching mechanisms.

AI.tldr: GBT-EDGE项目利用Green Bank望远镜对62个邻近星系进行CO(1-0)巡天，结合CALIFA光学IFS数据，发现低于主序带的淬灭星系仍保有大量分子气体，但其恒星形成效率显著降低，表明淬灭主要由效率抑制而非气体缺失驱动。
AI.motivation: 探究星系淬灭（quenching）的物理机制，特别是分子气体含量与恒星形成效率在星系从主序带到红序列转变过程中的作用。
AI.method: 使用GBT对62个10-140 Mpc范围内的星系进行CO(1-0)巡天，结合CALIFA的积分场光谱数据，获取分子气体质量、恒星形成率、金属丰度和恒星质量密度，计算恒星形成效率并分析不同转换因子下的影响。
AI.result: 主序带、绿谷和红序列星系的中位分子气体耗竭时间分别为2.10、6.90和127.7 Gyr。无论采用何种转换因子，星系偏离主序带越远，SFE系统性降低。淬灭星系仍保有与恒星形成星系相当的分子气体储库，但耗竭时间更长。
AI.conclusion: 低恒星形成率的主要驱动力是恒星形成效率受抑制，而非分子气体的缺失。淬灭可能由低气体密度和形态淬灭机制共同导致。

recommendation.reason: 该论文聚焦于邻近星系（z~0）的分子气体与恒星形成效率，与用户主要兴趣——高红移（cosmic noon）强引力透镜星系动力学、运动学及多相气体——在红移范围和研究焦点上存在显著差异。然而，论文主题（分子气体、恒星形成效率、星系淬灭）与用户Zotero库中的“dense gas”、“molecular gas”、“star formation”等关键词高度重叠，且作者列表包含用户核心作者Rodrigo Herrera-Camus。论文方法（CO巡天+IFS）与用户库中高红移星系的气体研究有方法学上的关联。因此，论文具有一定相关性，但并非直接匹配用户的核心兴趣领域。

recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等。论文提供了邻近星系分子气体耗竭时间的系统测量，对理解星系淬灭有贡献，但并非用户主要关注的高红移前沿。
recommendation.negative_reason: 红移范围不匹配：论文研究邻近宇宙（z~0），而用户主要兴趣是高红移（cosmic noon）。研究焦点差异：用户核心兴趣是强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学/运动学，而论文聚焦于邻近星系的恒星形成效率与淬灭机制。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了GBT-EDGE，一项使用绿岸望远镜对62个邻近（10-140 Mpc）星系进行的新CO(1-0)巡天，这些星系跨越了恒星形成主序（SFMS）、绿谷和红序。该星系样本选自CALIFA巡天，并配有积分场光谱（IFS），提供了对本地星系环境的代表性普查。结合CO数据集与CALIFA的光学IFS测量，我们推导出分子气体质量、恒星形成率（SFR）、金属丰度和恒星质量密度，以测量恒星形成效率（SFE）并研究星系淬灭的物理驱动因素。我们得到的中位分子气体消耗时间对于主序星系、绿谷星系和红星系样本分别为$2.10^{+2.35}_{-1.31}$、$6.90^{+17.00}_{-3.67}$和$127.7^{+201.6}_{-113.4}$ Gyr，假设采用银河系CO-to-H2转换因子。通过应用各种转换因子方案，我们也确认了SFE随星系低于SFMS的偏移量而系统性降低，无论采用何种方案。这表明，一些淬灭星系中低SFR的主要驱动因素是SFE受抑制，而非分子气体的缺失。我们的结果提供了证据，表明低于主序的星系可以保留与恒星形成星系相当的分子气体储库，但它们的消耗时间更长且恒星形成效率低下，这可能是由于低气体密度和形态淬灭机制的综合效应。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论为：低恒星形成率的主要驱动力是恒星形成效率受抑制，而非分子气体的缺失。淬灭可能由低气体密度和形态淬灭机制共同导致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The relation between global star formation rate (SFR) and stellar mass ( \(M_{{star}}\) ) for our GBT sample (black points; 62 galaxies), the CARMA sample (gray stars; Bolatto et al. , 2017 ) , and the full CALIFA sample (contours; Sánchez et al. , 2016a ) . The blue (upper) and red (lower) dashed lines indicate best linear fits from Cano-Díaz et al. ( 2016 ) for the main sequence and red galaxies, respectively. The GBT-EDGE sample is representative of the \(z=0\) galaxy population with \(M_{{star}}=10^{8.5-11.5}\) M ⊙ .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们GBT样本（黑点；62个星系）、CARMA样本（灰星；Bolatto等人，2017）和完整CALIFA样本（等高线；Sánchez等人，2016a）的全局恒星形成率（SFR）与恒星质量（\(M_{{star}}\)）之间的关系。蓝色（上）和红色（下）虚线分别表示Cano-Díaz等人（2016）对主序星系和红星系的最佳线性拟合。GBT-EDGE样本代表了\(z=0\)星系群，其\(M_{{star}}=10^{8.5-11.5}\) M ⊙。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: SDSS g (blue channel), r (green channel), and i (red channel) composite images for all 62 galaxies in our GBT-EDGE sample. Green valley (GV) and red galaxies (RGs) are labeled by a letter ‘G’ and ‘R’, respectively, in the top-right corners of their panels. These galaxies cover a variety of morphologies and galaxy environments, which constitute a representative sample of the local Universe (Figure 1 ) and enable comprehensive studies on the galaxy quenching process.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们GBT-EDGE样本中所有62个星系的SDSS g（蓝色通道）、r（绿色通道）和i（红色通道）合成图像。绿谷（GV）和红星系（RG）分别在其面板右上角用字母‘G’和‘R’标记。这些星系涵盖了多种形态和星系环境，构成了本地宇宙的代表性样本（图1），并能够对星系淬灭过程进行综合研究。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: An example of our background measurements (gray) and empirical OFF model construction (black), represented by the start (top panel) and end (bottom panel) of selected observing scans. These OFF models are used to remove variations in the background signals (Equation 3 ). This figure exemplifies the changes occurring in the spectral baseline during a leg of the on-the-fly map, caused by a combination of atmospheric and instrument instabilities.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：我们背景测量（灰色）和经验OFF模型构建（黑色）的一个示例，由所选观测扫描的开始（上方面板）和结束（下方面板）表示。这些OFF模型用于去除背景信号中的变化（方程3）。此图示例了在飞行扫描图的一段过程中，由于大气和仪器不稳定性组合导致的光谱基线变化。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: The peak signal to noise (S/N) maps of all 62 galaxies, integrating over a channel width of 90 km s -1 to highlight gas structures with line widths at that scale. GV and RGs are labeled by ‘G’ and ‘R’, respectively, on the top-right corner. The color scale (bottom-right panel) ranges from S/N = 1–15. Each panel shows the entire GBT field of view of \(2.5^{\prime}\times 2.5^{\prime}\) , and the common beam size of \(8.3^{\prime\prime}\) ( \(\sim\) 2 kpc for our sample) is shown on the top-left panel. The overlaid cyan contours indicate the intersection between each galaxy’s R 25 radius and CALIFA’s field of view, which defines the area for computing galaxy-integrated quantities (Section III ).
figures.caption_zh: 图4：所有62个星系的峰值信噪比（S/N）图，积分通道宽度为90 km s -1，以突出该尺度下线宽的气体结构。GV和RG分别在其右上角用‘G’和‘R’标记。颜色标尺（右下方面板）范围从S/N = 1–15。每个面板显示整个GBT视场\(2.5^{\prime}\times 2.5^{\prime}\)，公共波束大小为\(8.3^{\prime\prime}\)（对于我们样本约为2 kpc），显示在左上方面板。叠加的青色等高线表示每个星系的R 25半径与CALIFA视场的交集，这定义了计算星系积分量的区域（第三节）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison of the GBT CO (1–0) integrated line fluxes with those from the ALMA ACA CO (2–1) data (Villanueva et al. , 2024 ) for the nine galaxies that overlap between both samples. They show a CO (2–1)/(1–0) line ratio ( \(R_{21}\) ) of \(0.70\pm 0.27\) . Galaxies with the highest and lowest \(R_{21}\) tend to have higher uncertainties in the GBT data.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：对于两个样本重叠的九个星系，GBT CO (1–0) 积分线通量与ALMA ACA CO (2–1) 数据（Villanueva等人，2024）的比较。它们显示出CO (2–1)/(1–0) 线比（\(R_{21}\)）为\(0.70\pm 0.27\)。具有最高和最低\(R_{21}\)的星系在GBT数据中往往具有更高的不确定性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Examples of the moment 0 (left), 1 (middle), and 2 (right) maps, based on H \(\alpha\) + CO-dilated masking (see Section III.1 ). The white contours show S/N \(>5\) based on the moment-0 maps. The common beam size and cyan contours are the same as in Figure 4 . Some galaxies show high-quality detection in moment 0 and clear velocity gradients indicative of galaxy rotation (e.g., top row, NGC 0001), while some galaxies show spurious emission outside their \(R_{25}\) radii due to baseline variations, leading to high flux uncertainties (e.g., bottom row, NGC 0014). Our analysis only includes regions within the \(R_{25}\) radii, as enclosed by the cyan contours. The integrated spectra of S/N \(>5\) regions within the cyan contours are inserted into the middle panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：基于H \(\alpha\) + CO扩展掩膜（见第三节.1）的矩0（左）、1（中）和2（右）图示例。白色等高线显示基于矩0图的S/N \(>5\)。公共波束大小和青色等高线与图4相同。一些星系在矩0中显示出高质量探测和清晰的指示星系旋转的速度梯度（例如，上一行，NGC 0001），而一些星系在其\(R_{25}\)半径外显示出由于基线变化导致的虚假发射，从而导致高通量不确定性（例如，下一行，NGC 0014）。我们的分析仅包括\(R_{25}\)半径内的区域，如青色等高线所包围。青色等高线内S/N \(>5\)区域的积分光谱插入到中间面板中。
